name: Managed Infrastructure Services
description: End-to-end management of enterprise IT infrastructure including server, storage, network, and end-user computing. Covers lifecycle management, patch management, capacity planning, and 24/7 monitoring across on-premises and co-located environments.
positioning: Reliable, large-scale IT operations outsourcing for enterprises that want to focus on core business. Deutsche Telekom's service culture and ITIL maturity provide predictable SLAs.
competitive_moat: Scale of existing managed base, German engineering culture, ITIL process maturity
strategic_risk: Secular decline as workloads move to cloud; must actively convert managed infra customers to cloud managed services
